2603.29375.title: Deep Learning-Based Anomaly Detection in Spacecraft Telemetry on Edge Devices
2603.29375.paper_summary: Spacecraft anomaly detection is critical for mission safety, yet deploying sophisticated models on-board presents significant challenges due to hardware constraints. This paper investigates three approaches for spacecraft telemetry anomaly detection -- forecasting & threshold, direct classification, and image classification -- and optimizes them for edge deployment using multi-objective neural architecture optimization on the European Space Agency Anomaly Dataset. Our baseline experiments demonstrate that forecasting & threshold achieves superior detection performance (92.7% Corrected Event-wise F0.5-score (CEF0.5)) [1] compared to alternatives. Through Pareto-optimal architecture optimization, we dramatically reduced computational requirements while maintaining capabilities -- the optimized forecasting & threshold model preserved 88.8% CEF0.5 while reducing RAM usage by 97.1% to just 59 KB and operations by 99.4%. Analysis of deployment viability shows our optimized models require just 0.36-6.25% of CubeSat RAM, making on-board anomaly detection practical even on highly constrained hardware. This research demonstrates that sophisticated anomaly detection capabilities can be successfully deployed within spacecraft edge computing constraints, providing near-instantaneous detection without exceeding hardware limitations or compromising mission safety.
2603.29375.paper_summary_zh: 太空船異常檢測對於任務安全至關重要，但由於硬體限制，在船上部署複雜模型面臨重大挑戰。本文探討了三種太空船遙測異常檢測的方法——預測與閾值、直接分類和圖像分類——並使用多目標神經架構優化對其進行邊緣部署的優化，基於歐洲太空局異常數據集。我們的基準實驗表明，與其他方法相比，預測與閾值在檢測性能上達到了更優的表現（92.7% 修正事件-wise F0.5 分數 (CEF0.5)）[1]。通過Pareto最優架構優化，我們在保持能力的同時，顯著減少了計算需求——優化後的預測與閾值模型保留了88.8% CEF0.5，同時將RAM使用量減少了97.1%，僅剩59 KB，操作數量減少了99.4%。對部署可行性的分析顯示，我們的優化模型僅需0.36-6.25%的CubeSat RAM，使得即使在高度受限的硬體上，船上異常檢測也變得可行。本研究表明，複雜的異常檢測能力可以在太空船邊緣計算限制內成功部署，提供近乎即時的檢測，而不超過硬體限制或妨礙任務安全。
2603.29375.author: Christopher Goetze et.al.
2603.29375.authors: Christopher Goetze, Tim Schlippe, Daniel Lakey
